title: Shadow Games
content: You remain silent, watching the silhouette. 'You're the one who called me here,' you say flatly. 'If you have something to say, say it.'||The figure laughs softly. 'Patience. A rare quality in this city. Vane didn't have much of it. He was always in a rush to save the world.'||'He called me 'Spider' because I sit in the center of the web. I see the threads before they break. Vane was about to cut a very expensive thread.'||'Take this drive. It's his legacy. And his death warrant. Be careful how you handle it.'
